action.reasoning: Observation: best remains checkpoints/ensemble9_ep3.pt at 0.7668; recent inference-only changes and adding weak extra/CLIP members hurt. Analysis: with only 5 iterations left, another large blind ensemble is risky. A still plausible targeted attempt is to train a genuinely different pretrained backbone (ResNet50) using the same balanced-sampler short fine-tuning recipe, then add it with a small weight to the proven 9-ConvNeXt ensemble to reduce dilution while testing complementary errors. Decision: write a standalone ResNet50 training script and ensemble builder, train two 3-epoch ResNet seeds, create a low-weight ensemble9+ResNet checkpoint, and submit it; if it underperforms, final submission will revert to ensemble9_ep3.pt.
